zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Baguley於1536年出生在英國爾奧勒頓時，他的父親Randall Baguley18歲，母親Eleanor Grosvenor15歲。他於1561年11月26日與Alice Newton在英國諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1558年被列為vicar。他去世於1609年11月18日在英國爾可努恰福德享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Baguley于1536年出生在英国爾奧勒頓时，他的父亲Randall Baguley18岁，母亲Eleanor Grosvenor15岁。他于1561年11月26日与Alice Newton在英国諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1558年被列为vicar。他去世于1609年11月18日在英国爾可努恰福德享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾洛達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Baguley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley (Cheshire). The placename is from Old English bagga denoting an unidentified animal, perhaps the badger, + lēah ‘wood, clearing’. Compare Bagley .

variants.name: Bagley
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley in Cheshire or from any of several places called Bagley, in Devon, Gloucestershire, Shropshire, Somerset, and Yorkshire. These get their names either from the Old English personal name Bacga + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ or from an unattested Old English word, bagga, for a ‘bag-shaped’ object or creature + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Baguley was born in 1536, in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, his father, Randall Baguley, was 18 and his mother, Eleanor Grosvenor, was 15. He married Alice Newton on 26 November 1561, in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. In 1558, his occupation is listed as vicar. He died on 18 November 1609, in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Baguley est né en 1536, à Ollerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Randall Baguley, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Grosvenor, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Alice Newton le 26 novembre 1561, à Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. En 1558, sa profession de son indiquée est vicar. Il est décédé le 18 novembre 1609, à Knutsford, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Baguley 1536 in Ollerton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Randall Baguley 18 und seine Mutter Eleanor Grosvenor 15. Er hat am 26. November 1561 in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England Alice Newton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1558 ist sein Beruf als vicar aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. November 1609 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Knutsford, Cheshire, England und wurde in Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Baguley è nato il nel 1536 nel Ollerton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Randall Baguley, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Grosvenor, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Alice Newton il 26 novembre 1561, nel Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1558, la sua occupazione è indicata come vicar. Morì il 18 novembre 1609, nel Knutsford, Cheshire, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Baguleyが1536年にイギリスチェシュアイアオラートンで生まれた時，父Randall Baguleyは18歳，母Eleanor Grosvenorは15歳であった。1561年11月26日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロウドハムでAlice Newtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1558年，職業はvicarと記録されている。彼は1609年11月18日にイギリスチェシュアイアヌトスフォードで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアロウドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Baguley(이)가 1536년 영국 체실르 레르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Randall Baguley(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Grosvenor(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1561년 11월 26일 영국 노틴그함실르 로드함에서 Alice Newton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1558년, 그의 직업은 vicar이었다. 그는 1609년 11월 18일 영국 체실르 누츠퍼드에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 로드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Baguley nasceu em 1536, em Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Randall Baguley, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Grosvenor, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Newton em 26 de novembro de 1561, em Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1558, sua profissão aparece como vicar. Ele faleceu em 18 de novembro de 1609, em Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Baguley родился в 1536 г. в местности оллиртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Randall Baguley было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Grosvenor, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Newton 26 ноября 1561 г. в местности лоудхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1558 году он работал по профессии vicar. Он умер 18 ноября 1609 г. в местности нуцфорд, чешир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности лоудхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Baguley nació en 1536, en Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Randall Baguley, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Eleanor Grosvenor, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Alice Newton el 26 de noviembre de 1561, en Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1558, su ocupación registrada era vicar. Murió el 18 de noviembre de 1609, en Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Lowdham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
